clue: Production gets half-hearted reaction from Charlie
explanation: CREATION: production. Half-hearted = take half of the heart (centre) out of a word. REATION (half-hearted REACTION), from (after) C (Charlie).
hints: The definition usually goes at the beginning or at the end. In this case, it's unlikely to be Charlie...
Charlie is C in the NATO alphabet.
The heart of a word, in a cryptic, usually refers to its middle letters.
If a word is half-hearted, we're going to remove half of its heart.
The answer will be a word that means production.
Because "half-hearted reaction" is FROM "Charlie", the C for Charlie will go at the start of the answer.
